TRAYS.Tray Notes: The official product materials explicitly link the BIRMINGHAM HIP Resurfacing System Surgical Technique, indicating dedicated operative instrumentation.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: The BHR system is described as a hip resurfacing system built around bone-conserving resurfacing principles.
The BHR system includes the acetabular component that articulates with the femoral resurfacing component.

row.system_notes: Bone-conserving hip resurfacing platform intended for resurfacing arthroplasty rather than stemmed total hip replacement.
